title: Inspect chunks and cardinality
description: Report chunk count/sizes and per-tag series cardinality to ground tuning decisions in measured state.
body: Use when diagnosing a time-series performance or storage issue. Actions: query the engine's chunk metadata (count, size, interval) and series cardinality estimators per measurement/tag; report the largest contributors with numbers. Do not propose interval or schema changes without these measurements. This skill is read-only and exposes capability only; it must not alter policies without runtime permission. Validation signals include a concrete cardinality and chunk-size breakdown. Risk boundary: if cardinality is already near the instance limit, report it as a capacity risk and recommend escalation before more ingest.
